features.featureTitle: In App.tsx, after a user logs in and a realm is selected, query the backend for an existing character for that realm before showing any screen. If a character already exists for the selected realm in the current season, skip the CharacterCreationScreen entirely and route the player directly to the character sheet / dungeon select screen. The character creation screen must only be shown when no character exists for the chosen realm.

In App.tsx, if createCharacter is called and returns an #alreadyExists error (e.g., due to a race condition or duplicate call), the frontend must silently redirect the player to the character sheet / dungeon select screen rather than displaying an error message or crashing.
